name: The Bunker Indoor Golf Simulator at Skokie Sports Park
about: The Bunker Indoor Golf Simulator is part of the Skokie Sports Park, a facility recognized as one of the Top 50 Golf Ranges in America. The simulator is housed alongside a driving range equipped with TrackMan technology, a two-tier setup with 40 hitting stations, natural grass tees, and an automatic tee-up system. It offers a premier golf experience for year-round practice, featuring real-time shot tracking and detailed performance data. The venue also includes a 27-hole adventure mini-golf, batting cages, and facilities for customizable parties and events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan launch monitors provide precise shot tracking and performance analytics.
Year-round indoor simulator practice allows for consistent play regardless of weather.
Offering of both individual practice bays and group-friendly event spaces for various needs.

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services available on-site.
No information on alcohol services available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: The Bunker features TrackMan technology, offering real-time shot tracking and detailed performance data for precise swing analysis.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no information provided on the website about bringing outside food or beverages, so this policy is unknown.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time for a full 18-hole round on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Skokie Sports Park offers a 27-hole adventure mini-golf, making the facility suitable for families and children.
